meta.notes: Read-only research log. No trades are ever placed by this routine.

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: 78 of 80 required events reported as of company's May 11, 2026 update; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout guided for 2H 2026
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 69.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (priced late Jun/early Jul 2026, $89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20% of 180-day block) unlocks 2nd full trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into lockup

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap but second-largest single-name risk; lockup supply event ~2-3 weeks out

flags: SLS at 69.8% of NAV is nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold, in a pre-binary-catalyst biotech with no news that breaks the thesis but no catalyst confirmation either.
Zero USD cash buffer - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX facing its first staggered lockup unlock in ~2-3 weeks; stock already down 4-5% pre-market with no negative credit news (bond was oversubscribed, investment-grade).

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: Last disclosed count still 78 of 80 required events as of the May 11, 2026 / Q1 2026 update; no press release or 8-K found confirming the 80th event has been reached as of this run. Coverage notes the trial 'continues unaltered' after review (no DSMB halt signal). Topline readout still guided for 2H 2026. SEC EDGAR check confirms the company's most recent 8-K (filed June 15, 2026) addressed shareholder-vote matters, not the REGAL trial - no unblind/topline 8-K on file yet.
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event and unblinding

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 73.35% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold, up from 69.8% ten days ago (SPCX's larger decline shrank NAV and pushed SLS's share higher even as SLS itself dipped slightly). Trim ~36 shares to reach the 35% threshold.

catalyst.name: 180-day IPO lockup (from June 12, 2026 listing) + prior $25B investment-grade bond deal
catalyst.status: Stock now trades below its $135 IPO price and well below the $171.12 avg cost, down 16.4% since the 07/11 run. No adverse credit/bond news found - decline reads as lockup-overhang de-risking, not a credit event. Base 20% lockup tranche unlocks on the 2nd trading day after Q2 2026 earnings (date not yet announced, estimated late Jul/early Aug 2026); a conditional bonus 10% tranche only unlocks if SPCX closes >=$175.50 on 5 of 10 days into that earnings date - currently ~44% below that trigger, so the bonus tranche looks increasingly unlikely to fire. Industry-wide, ~$123B of shares are set to become unlockable in early August 2026. Full lockup expires Dec 8, 2026; Musk's 6.4B shares stay locked until June 2027.
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into/after the lockup window

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within the 35% cap (26.8%) but down 16.4% since last run and heading into its first lockup unlock in an estimated 1-3 weeks.

flags: SLS at 73.35% of NAV is now more than double the 35% single-name trim threshold, and has worsened from 69.8% ten days ago. REGAL topline catalyst remains unconfirmed/pending (last count 78/80 events); no unblind news found.

SPCX down 16.4% since the 07/11 run, now below its $135 IPO price and its $171.12 avg cost. No adverse credit/bond news; decline appears to reflect lockup-overhang de-risking ahead of the first tranche unlock (~1-3 weeks out).
Zero USD cash buffer persists - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).

Data gap from earlier in this run resolved on retry: SEC EDGAR search confirms SELLAS's latest 8-K (June 15, 2026) was shareholder-vote related, not a REGAL trial announcement - no unblind filing on record. Broad market check found premarket/futures modestly green (SPY +0.44%, QQQ +0.5%) with the Fed seen holding rates at the July meeting (~87.7% odds per CME FedWatch) - no risk-off macro backdrop driving the SLS/SPCX weakness.
